title: Gravity tricks
description: Allow players to shift their gravity and create planet !
body:
# Description:
<BIG>allow players to dynamically shift their gravitational pull using a special block</BIG>
# Addition:
## Add 3 blocks:
- Gravity block: change the gravity of a player in a 1 block radius
- Powerful gravity block: Change the gravity of a player in a 3 block radius
- Planet core block: Change gravity of a player like you were on a planet with configurable radius
## Additional information:
- Your gravity is reset at 2000 block y to prevent soft-lock

[![CurseForge](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/gravity-tricks.svg "Cursforge download")](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravity-tricks "CurseForge")
